case_title: JANET METH VS. RETIREMENT BOARD OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN
cause_of_action: WRITS OF MANDATE OR PROH., CERTI., ETC./ADMIN. AGEN

docket_entries.description: MINI-MINUTES FOR AUG-07-2007 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER JANET METH'S MOTION FOR PEREMPTORY WRIT OF MANDAMUS. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DENIED. C.C.P. SECTION 170.1 (A)(6)(A)(III) DOES NOT APPLY TO ADMINISTRATIVE HEARING OFFICERS. GAI V CITY OF SELMAN (1998) 68 CAL. APP 4TH 213. 229-233. IF THE PROVISION WERE APPLICABLE, PLAINTIFF DELAYED IN SEEKING THIS WRIT. GAI AT 230. PLAINTIFF IS REQUIRED TO SHOW ACTUAL BIAS TOWARD PLAINTIFF (ANDREWS V AGRICULTURAL LABOR RELATIONS (1981) 28 CAL 3D 781, 794) AND HAS NOT DONE SO. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: JOE VICKSTEIN, CSR #4780

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER JANET METH'S MOTION FOR PEREMPTORY WRIT OF MANDAMUS CONTINUED FROM JUL-03-2007 TO LAW AND MOTION AT AUG-07-2007, 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: CONTINUED TO AUGUST 7, 2007 PURSUANT TO STIPULATION FILED ON JUNE 27, 2007. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600

MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER JANET METH'S MOTION FOR PEREMPTORY WRIT OF MANDAMUS.
APPEARANCES: GEORGE ENGLER, ESQUIRE (415.202.1919) APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. NANCY J. TAVERNIT, DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY (OFFICE OF THE CITY ATTORNEY, 415.554.3961) APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT.
RULING: ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DENIED. C.C.P. SECTION 170.1 (A)(6)(A)(iii) DOES NOT APPLY TO ADMINISTRATIVE HEARING OFFICERS. GAI V CITY OF SELMAN (1998) 68 CAL. APP 4TH 213. 229-233. IF THE PROVISION WERE APPLICABLE, PLAINTIFF DELAYED IN SEEKING THIS WRIT. GAI AT 230. PLAINTIFF IS REQUIRED TO SHOW ACTUAL BIAS TOWARD PLAINTIFF (ANDREWS V AGRICULTURAL LABOR RELATIONS (1981) 28 CAL 3D 781, 794) AND HAS NOT DONE SO. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (302/PJM/KD) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: JOE VICKSTEIN, CSR 4780
